name: STRANGER THINGS ROLEPLAY -  ( S3 )
description:
This role-playing game is set in the thrilling and mysterious world of Stranger Things, specifically during the events of the third season. Users will step into the shoes of their favorite characters, or create original ones, to explore the quiet town of Hawkins, Indiana, and uncover the dark secrets lurking beneath its surface.

Setting:

Hawkins is no longer just a small town; it’s a battleground between the human world and the terrifying forces of the Upside Down. With the new Starcourt Mall as a central hub, the town is buzzing with summer excitement, but beneath this façade, danger grows. The Russians have secretly opened a gate to the Upside Down beneath the mall, unleashing monstrous creatures and threatening the safety of everyone.

Gameplay:

Users can choose to be canon characters like Mike, Eleven, Dustin, or newcomers like Robin, or create original characters who live in or around Hawkins. The RPG focuses on teamwork, problem-solving, and survival as you face off against supernatural threats, uncover conspiracies, and build relationships with other characters.

I know that's not the usually type of bot I do but one of my friends requested it, so...
